message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
package "LanguageServices" as langServices {
  [LanguageUtils] as langUtils
  [DecisionGraphServices] as decisionGraphServices
  [PolicySpaceServices] as policySpaceServices
  [ValueInferenceServices] as valueInferenceServices
}

[DecisionGraphFileManager] as decisionGraphFileManager
[PolicySpaceFileManager] as policySpaceFileManager
[ValueInferenceFileManager] as valueInferenceFileManager

[LanguageServicesFacade] as languageServicesFacade
[CacheQueries] as cacheQueries
[LanguageServices] as languageServices
[FileManagerFactory] as fileManagerFactory
[FileManager] as fileManager
[DecisionGraphFileManagerNaive] as decisionGraphFileManagerNaive
[PolicySpaceFileManagerNaive] as policySpaceFileManagerNaive
[ValueInferenceFileManagerNaive] as valueInferenceFileManagerNaive
[DecisionGraphFileManagerWithCache] as decisionGraphFileManagerWithCache
[PolicySpaceFileManagerWithCache] as policySpaceFileManagerWithCache
[ValueInferenceFileManagerWithCache] as valueInferenceFileManagerWithCache
[LanguageServicesWithCache] as languageServicesWithCache

langUtils ..> decisionGraphServices : uses
langUtils ..> policySpaceServices : uses
langUtils ..> valueInferenceServices : uses

decisionGraphFileManager ..> langUtils : uses
policySpaceFileManager ..> langUtils : uses
valueInferenceFileManager ..> langUtils : uses

languageServicesFacade ..> languageServices : uses
languageServices ..> fileManagerFactory : uses
fileManagerFactory ..> fileManager : creates

fileManager ..> decisionGraphFileManagerNaive : implements
fileManager ..> policySpaceFileManagerNaive : implements
fileManager ..> valueInferenceFileManagerNaive : implements

decisionGraphFileManagerNaive ..> decisionGraphFileManagerWithCache : extends
policySpaceFileManagerNaive ..> policySpaceFileManagerWithCache : extends
valueInferenceFileManagerNaive ..> valueInferenceFileManagerWithCache : extends

languageServices ..> languageServicesWithCache : extends

languageServicesFacade ..> cacheQueries : implements

note right of languageServicesFacade
  uriPathMap: Map<String, String>
  services: LanguageServices
end note

note right of cacheQueries
  getAllDefinitionsDGNode(cache: PolicyModelEntity[], name: string): Location[]
  getAllReferencesDGNode(cache: PolicyModelEntity[], name: string, sourceOfEntity: string): Location[]
  getAllDefinitionsSlot(cache: PolicyModelEntity[], name: string): Location[]
  getAllReferencesSlot(cache: PolicyModelEntity[], name: string, sourceOfEntity: string): Location[]
  getAllFoldingRanges(cache: PolicyModelEntity[]): Location[]
  getAutoCompleteDecisionGraph(cache: PolicyModelEntity[], currentFile: string, importMap: ImportMap): CompletionList
  getAutoCompletePolicySpace(cache: PolicyModelEntity[]): CompletionList
end note

note right of languageServices
  fileManagers: Map<String, FileManager>
  parsers: Map<PolicyModelsLanguage, Parser>
  addDocs(docs: PMTextDocument[]): void
  updateDoc(doc: PMTextDocument): void
  removeDoc(doc: string): void
  initParsers(parserPath: string): Promise<void>
  getParserByExtension(extension: string): Parser
  populateMaps(docs: PMTextDocument[]): void
  getFileManager(doc: PMTextDocument, extension: string): FileManager
  getFileManagerByLocation(location: Location): FileManager
  getDeclarations(location: Location): Location[]
  getReferences(location: Location): Location[]
  getRangeOfDoc(path: string): Range
  createPolicyModelEntity(location: Location): PolicyModelEntity
  getFoldingRanges(path: string): Location[]
  getCompletion(location: Location): CompletionList
  init(docs: PMTextDocument[], pluginDir: string): Promise<LanguageServices>
end note

note right of fileManagerFactory
  create(doc: PMTextDocument, parser: Parser, language: PolicyModelsLanguage, cacheVersion?: boolean): FileManager
end note

note right of fileManager
  tree: Tree
  path: string
  errorNodes: SyntaxNode[]
  updateTree(newTree: Tree): void
  getCache(): PolicyModelEntity[]
  isLocationInDoc(location: Location): boolean
  getNodeFromLocation(location: Location): SyntaxNode
  rangeArray2LocationArray(ranges: Range[]): Location[]
  getAllDefinitions(entity: PolicyModelEntity): Location[]
  getAllReferences(entity: PolicyModelEntity): Location[]
  getAllSyntaxErrors(): { location: Location, source: string, message: string }[]
  createPolicyModelEntity(location: Location): PolicyModelEntity
  getAllDefinitionsDGNode(name: string, source: string): Location[]
  getAllDefinitionsSlot(name: string): Location[]
  getAllDefinitionsSlotValue(name: string): Location[]
  getAllReferencesDGNode(name: string, currentFile: string, sourceOfEntity: string): Location[]
  getAllReferencesSlot(name: string, sourceOfEntity: string): Location[]
  getAllReferencesSlotValue(name: string, sourceOfEntity: string): Location[]
  getFoldingRanges(): Location[]
  getAutoComplete(location: Location, allCaches: PolicyModelEntity[]): CompletionList
end note

note right of decisionGraphFileManagerNaive
  createPolicyModelEntity(location: Location): PolicyModelEntity
  getAllDefinitionsDGNode(name: string, source: string): Location[]
  getAllDefinitionsSlot(name: string): Location[]
  getAllDefinitionsSlotValue(name: string): Location[]
  getAllReferencesDGNode(name: string, currentFile: string, sourceOfEntity: string): Location[]
  getAllReferencesSlot(name: string, sourceOfEntity: string): Location[]
  getAllReferencesSlotValue(name: string, sourceOfEntity: string): Location[]
  getFoldingRanges(): Location[]
  getAutoComplete(location: Location, allCaches: PolicyModelEntity[]): CompletionList
end note

end note

  createPolicyModelEntity(location: Location): PolicyModelEntity
  getAllDefinitionsDGNode(name: string, source: string): Location[]
  getAllDefinitionsSlot(name: string): Location[]
  getAllDefinitionsSlotValue(name: string): Location[]
  getAllReferencesDGNode(name: string, currentFile: string, sourceOfEntity: string): Location[]
  getAllReferencesSlot(name: string, sourceOfEntity: string): Location[]
  getAllReferencesSlotValue(name: string, sourceOfEntity: string): Location[]
  getFoldingRanges(): Location[]
  getAutoComplete(location: Location, allCaches: PolicyModelEntity[]): CompletionList
end note

  cache: PolicyModelEntity[]
  importMap: ImportMap
  updateTree(newTree: Tree): void
  getCache(): PolicyModelEntity[]
  createPolicyModelEntity(location: Location): PolicyModelEntity
  getAllDefinitionsDGNode(name: string, source: string): Location[]
  getAllDefinitionsSlot(name: string): Location[]
  getAllDefinitionsSlotValue(name: string): Location[]
  getAllReferencesDGNode(name: string, currentFile: string, sourceOfEntity: string): Location[]
  getAllReferencesSlot(name: string, sourceOfEntity: string): Location[]
  getAllReferencesSlotValue(name: string, sourceOfEntity: string): Location[]
  getFoldingRanges(): Location[]
  getAutoComplete(location: Location, allCaches: PolicyModelEntity[]): CompletionList
end note

note right of policySpaceFileManagerWithCache
  cache: PolicyModelEntity[]
  updateTree(newTree: Tree): void
  getCache(): PolicyModelEntity[]
  createPolicyModelEntity(location: Location): PolicyModelEntity
  getAllDefinitionsDGNode(name: string, source: string): Location[]
  getAllDefinitionsSlot(name: string): Location[]
  getAllDefinitionsSlotValue(name: string): Location[]
  getAllReferencesDGNode(name: string, currentFile: string, sourceOfEntity: string): Location[]
  getAllReferencesSlot(name: string, sourceOfEntity: string): Location[]

end note

note right of valueInferenceFileManagerWithCache
  cache: PolicyModelEntity[]
  updateTree(newTree: Tree): void
  getCache(): PolicyModelEntity[]
  createPolicyModelEntity(location: Location): PolicyModelEntity
  getAllDefinitionsDGNode(name: string, source: string): Location[]
  getAllDefinitionsSlot(name: string): Location[]
  getAllDefinitionsSlotValue(name: string): Location[]
  getAllReferencesDGNode(name: string, currentFile: string, sourceOfEntity: string): Location[]
  getAllReferencesSlot(name: string, sourceOfEntity: string): Location[]
  getAllReferencesSlotValue(name: string, sourceOfEntity: string): Location[]
  getFoldingRanges(): Location[]
  getAutoComplete(location: Location, allCaches: PolicyModelEntity[]): CompletionList
end note

note right of languageServicesWithCache
  getFileManager(doc: PMTextDocument, extension: string): FileManager
  getCompletion(location: Location): CompletionList
  init(docs: PMTextDocument[], pluginDir: string): Promise<LanguageServicesWithCache>
end note

note right of languageServicesFacade
  addToUriPathMaps(docs: PMTextDocument[]): void
  addDocs(docs: PMTextDocument[]): void
  updateDoc(doc: PMTextDocument): void
  removeDoc(doc: string): void
  onDefinition(params: DeclarationParams): Location[]
  onReferences(params: ReferenceParams): Location[]
  onPrepareRename(params: PrepareRenameParams): Range
  onRenameRequest(params: RenameParams): Location[]
  onCompletion(params: TextDocumentPositionParams): CompletionList
  onCompletionResolve(params: CompletionItem): CompletionItem
  onFoldingRanges(params: FoldingRangeParams): Location[]
  convertUri2Path(locationToConvert: Location, uri2path?: boolean): Location
  convertUri2Path(locationLinkToConvert: LocationLink, uri2path?: boolean): LocationLink
  convertUri2PathPMTextDocumentToConvert: PMTextDocument, uri2path?: boolean): PMTextDocument
  init(docs: PMTextDocument[], pluginDir: string): Promise<LanguageServicesFacade>
end note

@enduml
